item: Locked Formula A PRFT-high versus PRFT-low DEG signature
direction: Local query input contains 150 upregulated and 150 downregulated PRFT-high genes; SigCom interface recognized 140 up and 131 down entries according to manual query context.
recommended_use_in_manuscript: Supplementary Figure/Methods context only; do not alter locked model or main DEG analysis.
overclaim_risk: moderate if described as a new model or rerun analysis
safe_wording: locked Formula A PRFT-high versus PRFT-low DEG signature used for supplementary perturbational signature reversal
comment: No DEG rerun and no Formula A change were performed in Phase17C.

direction: 30 top reverser rows retained for manual review
